command:
bash -lc 'set -e; export PATH=/home/agent/.npm-global/bin:$PATH; command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "codex not found PATH=$PATH" >&2; exit 127; }; cat /opt/agent/system_prompt.txt /workspace/PROMPT.md > /tmp/codex_prompt.txt; { printf "

AUTORESEARCH_FEEDBACK_OVERRIDE
"; printf "%s
" "- submit.ack is a transient receipt in autoresearch; submit_result.json is canonical." "- After creating submit.signal, wait until submit.signal is gone and submit_result.json exists and is non-empty; read it even when submit.ack is absent." "- Before each new submit, remove old submit.ack and submit_result.json if they exist, then create submit.signal." "- Never wait forever only for submit.ack."; } >> /tmp/codex_prompt.txt; codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox exec -m "gpt-5.4" -C /workspace --skip-git-repo-check "$(cat /tmp/codex_prompt.txt)"'
